headline: ExxonMobil Stock Offers a Different Kind of Fuel
summary: This energy giant has been a standout performer, but its real value to your portfolio lies in how it moves, or doesn't move, with the market.

raw.headline: ExxonMobil Stock Offers a Different Kind of Fuel

headline: Occidental Petroleum Cut Its Capital Spending by 8% for 2026. Should the Oil Giant Rethink Its Plans with Crude Prices Now Up 30%?
summary: Occidental Petroleum should remain prudent and not be tempted to boost production simply because oil prices are elevated.
